title: axonopus canescens
intro: Axonopus canescens, also known as the gray broom grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Axonopus canescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used to treat various ailments.
